heading: Reserve components: detail of members of regular and reserve components to assist
label: 12501 Reserve components: detail of members of regular and reserve components to assist
text: The Secretary concerned shall detail such members of the regular and reserve components under his jurisdiction as are necessary to effectively develop, train, instruct, and administer those reserve components.
notes: Prior ProvisionsProvisions similar to those in this section were contained in , prior to repeal by .section 715 of this titlePub. L. 103–337, § 1662(g)(2)
